run_method: Manual execution of skill procedure steps in this agent session with live Grafana (docker compose + seeded DB)

assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: File exists: v2/screenshots/after-00-overview.png (210256 bytes). Only one dashboard (00-overview.json) was modified in the PR diff, so one screenshot is correct.

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Filename is 'after-00-overview.png' which follows the after-<slug>.png pattern from the skill. '00-overview' is derived from the source file '00-overview.json'.

assertions.description: No before screenshots were taken (after-only is the default)
assertions.evidence: ls v2/screenshots/before-*.png returns 'No such file or directory'. Only after-*.png files exist.

assertions.description: Only affected dashboards are screenshotted — no unmodified dashboards
assertions.evidence: ls v2/screenshots/*.png | wc -l returns 1. Only 00-overview was in the git diff, and only after-00-overview.png was created.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)
assertions.evidence: Playwright browser_snapshot confirmed loaded panels before screenshot: Deployment Frequency=5.0 deploys/wk, Lead Time=5.5 days, Change Fail Rate=5.0%, MTTR=1.6 days, Active Copilot Seats=14, Acceptance Rate=31.8%. Screenshot visually confirms rendered panels with data.

notes: This was a manual walk-through of the skill's procedure, not a spawned agent session. The eval confirms the skill's steps produce correct results when followed in order. A4 count is 1 (not 2 as in the original test design) because only one dashboard was actually modified in the eval PR.
